Module com.escriturarapida.miniproyectopoo
Package com.escriturarapida.miniproyectopoo.controller

Class GameController

java.lang.Object
com.escriturarapida.miniproyectopoo.controller.GameController
public class GameController extends Object
Controller for the Fast Typing Game user interface. This class is responsible for managing the interaction between the JavaFX graphical user interface and the game logic. Main responsibilities include: Initializing the game and UI components Handling user input validation Managing the round timer Updating UI elements such as labels and buttons Handling game restart and gameover states The controller uses a Timeline to implement a countdown timer for each round of the game.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Abrahan YbaÃ±ez 2418114-3743

      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • GameController

      public GameController()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller after the FXML file has been loaded. This method creates the game instance, loads the word repository, disables the restart button, and starts the first round.

    • handleValidate

      public void handleValidate()
      Handles the validation button action. This method compares the text entered by the player with the target text. If the text matches exactly, the player advances to the next level. Otherwise, the game ends. If the maximum level is reached, the game is completed successfully.

    • handleRestart

      public void handleRestart()
      Handles the restart button action. This method resets the game state, enables user input again, disables the restart button, and starts a new game from level one.

    • startNewRound

      private void startNewRound()
      Starts a new round of the game. This method selects a random text from the repository, updates the level label, clears the input field, and starts the countdown timer.

    • startTimer

      private void startTimer()
      Starts the countdown timer for the current round. The timer decreases the remaining seconds every second. If the time reaches zero, the game ends automatically.

    • stopTimer

      private void stopTimer()
      Stops the current timer if it is running.

    • updateTimerLabel

      private void updateTimerLabel()
      Updates the timer label in the user interface.

    • finishGame

      private void finishGame(String reason)
      Ends the current game and displays a summary dialog. The dialog shows the reason why the game ended, the number of completed levels, the level reached, and the remaining time.
      Parameters:
      reason - the reason why the game ended
